standard_variable.semantic_intent: source-supplied hourly SOFA rolling 24-hour score time series
standard_variable.semantic_grain: one row per ICU stay hour

database_mapping.source_grain: one official source-supplied SOFA row per stay_id and hour index
database_mapping.target_grain: one retained SOFA score row per stay_id and score_hour_index

identifier_normalization.hadm_id_role: hospital admission identifier joined from icu.icustays
identifier_normalization.stay_id_role: ICU stay identifier from source SOFA row and icu.icustays

score_phenotype_build_translation.time_basis_translation: retain MIMIC source hr as score_hour_index and source starttime/endtime as the one-hour score slice; expose score_window_start/end/hours for the rolling 24-hour effective window
score_phenotype_build_translation.score_value_translation: map source sofa_24hours to std_sofa_total_24hours with canonical unit score_points and integer range validation
score_phenotype_build_translation.component_trace_translation: retain source current-hour organ components and rolling 24-hour organ components as same-row trace context
score_phenotype_build_translation.no_row_translation: absence of a row means no approved source SOFA row under this mapping, not zero SOFA

validation_contract.no_row_policy_check: absence of row is not universal proof of no organ dysfunction and should not be converted to zero SOFA without a governed downstream rule
notes: The MIMIC SOFA source hour grid is inherited from the official source-supplied SOFA table and should not be reinterpreted as exact ICU boundary truth.
Early rows before a full 24-hour window remain valid but expose score_window_hours for downstream filtering.

execution_contract.formal_output_rule: The governed execution.py entrypoint should read this mapping spec and delegate to the current local reviewed implementation.
execution_contract.non_bypassable_target_rule: Formal std_sofa outputs for MIMIC-IV-3.1 should be produced only through the governed execution.py path.
